llm_eval.notes: py_compile OK; deny emits correct permissionDecision JSON + exit2 (documented backward-compat), ALLOW_RUBRIC_EDIT bypass and non-Write tools pass through; registry parse uses scoped (OSError,JSONDecodeError); minor smells: redundant 'import json as _json' (json already top-level) and top-level fail-open except but it is commented intentional
